creator: Jim.Pirzyk@disney.com
text:
when cat'ing /compat/linux/proc/stat on an smp host, we only get this:

cpu 2678 0 1439 605126
disk 0 0 0 0
page 6384 0
swap 0 0
intr 820322
ctxt 198102
btime 990486334

but we should be getting this:

cpu 2678 0 1439 605126
cpu0 1339 0 719 302563
cpu1 1339 0 719 302563
disk 0 0 0 0
page 6384 0
swap 0 0
intr 820322
ctxt 198102
btime 990486334

How-To-Repeat: 	cat /compat/linux/proc/stat
